at_a_glance: You have spent $9.41 across 16 sessions over 3 days. Today was the most expensive session at ~$1.17, covering 7 work items: the full Iteration Mode feature plus a cluster of packaging and distribution bug fixes (BUG-012 through BUG-016 and FEATURE-SIGNING). The project is 98% complete with only a smoke test and broader distribution work remaining.

session_narratives.2026-04-18-001: The initial planning session — brainstorm, architect, and spec review. Expensive per task because these skills read and write large structured documents from scratch.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-002: The heaviest session at $1.30 — all 9 Phase 1 foundation tasks plus phase review. Eleven tasks in one run with vibe-parallel orchestration drove the cost up.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-003: Pure planning session for F-STATE — no code committed, just spec generation and review. Cost reflects the reading of BRIEF.md, SPEC.md, and writing detailed FEATURE_TASKS.md.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-004: F-STATE build — all 5 state machine tasks completed. Steady $0.10/task average, consistent with medium-complexity UI work.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-005: F-FIRST-RUN planning session only — no tasks committed. Feature spec and spec-review drove the cost against a growing context.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-006: Tiny session — only FRN-004 (the final first-run task) plus vibe-cost. Context overhead was relatively low.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-007: Design system implementation plus 6 bug fixes and mode dropdown fix. The large design output (10 code sections) explains the higher output token count.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-008: DECISION-004 (move recording to main window) + BUG-004 — a significant architectural refactor that rewrote several IPC channels.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-009: Vibrancy, BUG-007, and the FEATURE-001 splash screen. The splash implementation was an L-sized task that drove most of the cost.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-010: Phase 2 review + all 11 backlog fixes (BL-013 through BL-023). The review itself consumed 80K tokens reading the full codebase.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-011: Final review gate + RFX console cleanup. A focused end-of-v1 session — two tasks, low output.
session_narratives.2026-04-19-012: Phase 4 kickoff — dark mode follow-up, language docs, TASKS update, and two feature removals (old history + language). Moderate cost for cleanup work.
session_narratives.2026-04-19-013: Session startup only plus vibe-cost. Minimal work — this was likely a short exploratory session with no committed tasks.
session_narratives.2026-04-20-014: FEATURE-011 Pause and Resume — all 3 tasks plus vibe-add-feature spec. A clean $0.17/task average for medium React component work.
session_narratives.2026-04-20-015: DESIGN-001 vibrancy and ambient glow — a single S-sized task. Low cost, focused change.
session_narratives.2026-04-20-016: The largest Phase 4 session at $1.17 — FEATURE-012 Iteration Mode (6 subtasks, L), plus a cluster of packaging bug fixes: BUG-012 PATH resolution, BUG-013/014/015 mic and whisper packaging issues, BUG-016 mic dialog cleanup, and FEATURE-SIGNING self-signed cert. DECISIONS.md at 78KB is now the primary context pressure.

recommendations.title: DECISIONS.md at 78KB is loaded on every session
recommendations.body: DECISIONS.md has grown to 78KB — approximately 19,500 tokens — and is likely read whole on every session startup. This adds roughly $0.06 of pure overhead per session. Consider archiving decisions older than Phase 2 into a DECISIONS_ARCHIVE.md that is never loaded automatically.

recommendations.title: Prompt caching unused across all 16 sessions
recommendations.body: Cache hit rate is 0% across every session in this project. CLAUDE.md is 21KB of stable content that could be cached — it rarely changes between sessions. Prompt caching would reduce input costs by 90% on cached tokens. This is the single highest-leverage optimisation available.

forecast_narrative: Two tasks remain: a manual smoke test (the ⬜ item in Phase 3 polish) and broader distribution work (notarisation, Sparkle, landing page). The smoke test is an S-task at roughly $0.05–0.10. Distribution planning is unscoped — if it involves vibe-add-feature spec work it could reach $0.30–0.50. Total remaining project cost: $0.10–0.60 depending on distribution scope.
